sentiment.reasoning: Market expansion into Southeast Asia indicates a proactive growth strategy that should provide long-term upside.

headlines.headline: Frelis Genomics reports record quarterly revenue, up 5% year-over-year

headlines.headline: Kelvik Power begins scheduled maintenance of digital payments systems

sentiment.reasoning: Scheduled maintenance is a routine operational event that is unlikely to have a material impact on financial performance.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
